title: uraria balansae
intro: Uraria balansae, also known as the Indian uraria or Indian snail paste, is a type of climbing plant belonging to the family Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Uraria balansae include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Uraria balansae can be prepared into herbal remedies such as decoctions, infusions, and pastes, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
